productDisplayName: Puma Men Contest HI Black Casual Shoes
description: These stylish Contest Hi shoes from puma are great for urban wear. These high profile shoes are great for regular wear since their attractive high-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Synthetic leather uppers for durability and protection Perorated side panels and toe box for enhanced breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded tongue and built up padded collar with fabric padding for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name appliqued on the tongue and printed on the side Appliqued suede formstripes on the sides cat logo on the heel Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort EVA midsole for greater shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole with horizontal grooves for greater traction Pivot point on the big toe mound and heel for greater 180 degree movement Flex grooves for greater flexibility fo the feet
